connectorId.description: A unique identifier for the connector.

conversationId.description: A unique identifier for the conversation if you are continuing an existing conversation.

disableFunctions.description: Flag indicating whether all function calls should be disabled for the conversation. If true, no calls to functions will be made.

instructions.description: An array of instruction objects, which can be either simple strings or detailed objects.

messages.description: An array of message objects containing the conversation history.

persist.description: Indicates whether the conversation should be saved to storage. If true, the conversation will be saved and will be available in Kibana.
